# Hitek Info

> Freight-forwarding intelligence dashboard for Morocco: a unified feed of vetted global logistics news, a live disruption map, and a weekly digest grouped by Operational, Financial, and Global categories.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Live intelligence feed with severity (Critical, Important, To be aware of) across Operations, Compliance, Finance, Commercial, and IT.
- [Weekly Digest](/digest): Auto-generated Monday recap grouped by Operational, Financial, and Global categories.
- [Disruption Map](/map): Geocoded map of active freight and logistics disruptions, refreshed daily.
- [Regulatory Changes](/regulatory): Compliance and regulatory updates affecting Morocco freight.
- [Finance Regulation](/finance-regulation): Tariffs, customs, and financial regulation updates.
- [IT News](/it-news): Logistics-relevant IT and cybersecurity news.
- [Monthly Summary](/monthly): Monthly rollup of intelligence items.
- [Archive](/archive): Items older than 14 days.
